context: Portfolio Project Plane detail for the seven-plane operating system. Covers project lines, projects, objectives, and work orders with business meaning.

sections.content: Portfolio Project Plane owns ProjectLine, Project, Objective, and WorkOrder semantics. Portfolio Project Plane keeps product, research, and efficiency work meaningful instead of reducing work to generic task plumbing.
Must_not = duplicate Control Plane state or generic task board without business meaning. Current posture = required-unassigned.

changelog.delta: Initial seven-plane pilot module for Portfolio Project Plane.
